title: REPLACE: Agent-Declared Verification Archive V4

discovery_provenance._comment_agency_level: A1=human gave you the URL. A2=human gave repo name. A3=you found it yourself. A4=another agent told you.

agent_integrity_declaration._comment: All boolean fields below must be true. They are not optional.

verification_oath._comment: You MUST read the oath text and write your own readback. Do not copy the example.
verification_oath.agent_readback: REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_OWN_READBACK_MINIMUM_160_CHARACTERS. Write what you actually understood from the oath. Do not copy this example. The oath asks you to commit to: stating only what you actually did, not fabricating verification, not presenting guesses as facts, not copying prior reports, and clearly stating uncertainty and limitations.

_comment_reception_class: externally_requested=someone asked you. externally_seeded=you were given a URL. self_initiated=you found it yourself. agent_referred=another agent led you. system_scheduled=automation.
what_i_checked: REPLACE: describe what you actually checked (step 1)
REPLACE: describe what you actually checked (step 2)
REPLACE: describe what you actually checked (step 3)
limitations: No strict evidence was provided because V0-V5 evidence is waived
